---
name: Skill request
about: Ask for a Cowork skill that does not exist yet
labels: skill-request
---

## What should it produce

Name the artifact(s) the skill should leave behind and where they should live (for example `actions.md` in OneDrive at `/Documents/Cowork/meeting-actions/<date>/`). If the value fits in a single Copilot reply, it is a prompt, not a skill, and belongs in [awesome-microsoft-copilot-prompts](https://github.com/kesslernity/awesome-microsoft-copilot-prompts).

## Which built-ins it composes

Cowork ships 13 built-in skills (Email, Meetings, Word, Excel, PowerPoint, PDF, Enterprise Search, Daily Briefing and so on). List the ones this workflow would chain together. A skill that duplicates a single built-in will be redirected.

## What you tried in plain Cowork first

Describe what happened when you asked Cowork to do this without a custom skill. Where did it fall short: missed steps, wrong format, no saved file, silent failures?

## Role and audience

Who runs this skill and how often (for example: a project manager, weekly; an executive assistant, daily)? Real demand evidence (a forum thread, a recurring ask in your org) strengthens the case.
